items.description: Multi vehicle crash on US 22 westbound between 1 miles WEST of Exit: I-81 NORTH/US 322 EAST TO I 78 - HAZLETON/ALLEN and Exit: PA 39 - LINGLESTOWN/ROCKVILLE. All lanes closed.
